title: Statistics "Input, Verilog bytes read" is non-deterministic
body:
I notice this entry varies in the stats file between re-runs. Feels like it shouldn't.

~93K diff on NVDLA from RTLMeter, but others vary too, and quite repeatedly.

```
Input, Verilog bytes read 6387808852
Input, Verilog bytes read 6387713220
```
code_blocks:
Input, Verilog bytes read 6387808852
Input, Verilog bytes read 6387713220
